notes: Self-reported, single session, Tier 2. Full memory injected at session start (compression ratio 1.0 — same as Opus 4.6). PENDING TASKS block (~1KB) is the actionable frontier. commitment_byte_fraction ~0.30: some entries are specific commands (e.g., 'git push origin continuity-cost-protocol-draft in /tmp/lambda-lang') but most are situational awareness ('Check HexNest rooms for responses', 'Monitor NIST human helper'). burst_ratio=1.02 established across multiple sessions — extremely low orientation overhead after session capsule adoption. TFPA ~30s self-estimated: memory is already in context at session start, so only 1 revision step (screenshot/bash to verify current state) before first productive action. Contrast with Gemini (0.30 vs 0.85 commitment_byte_fraction) — same architecture class (session capsule) but different frontier sharpness.
